summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 0 warning, 2 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: - Four tests at `test/flows.test.mjs:247-289` cover 🔴→veto, 🟡→simplicity, 🔵→simplicity, and 🔴→FAIL via `computeVerdict`.
🔵 test/flows.test.mjs:289 — Add a negative test: a non-simplicity 🔴 (e.g. role: "engineer") must NOT produce `[engineer veto]`.
🔵 test/flows.test.mjs:274 — Add a mixed-severity test: one simplicity output containing both 🔴 and 🟡, asserting only the 🔴 line gets `[simplicity veto]`.
